title: Merge Intervals
problem_statement: Given a collection of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals and return an array of the merged intervals.

examples.explanation: Intervals [1,3] and [2,6] overlap and are merged.

intuition: Sort intervals by start time and merge consecutive overlapping intervals in one pass.

approaches.name: Sort and merge
approaches.description: Sort intervals by start time, then iterate and merge overlapping intervals by extending the end when necessary.
approaches.why_not: Comparing every pair of intervals is O(n^2) and unnecessary after sorting.

interview_qa.a: Sort intervals by start time so overlapping intervals are adjacent.

interview_qa.q: How do you detect an overlap?
interview_qa.a: Two intervals overlap when the next start is less than or equal to the current end.
